commands.label: Data-room index
commands.purpose: Regenerate this buyer-facing artifact inventory after evidence changes.

commands.label: Release gate
commands.purpose: Refresh automated quality and release evidence.

commands.label: Release archives
commands.purpose: Refresh source and web archive checksums before transfer.

commands.label: Release handoff
commands.purpose: Pin final handoff to the commit being transferred.

items.label: Release gate report
items.purpose: Automated quality, model, web, security, and release evidence gate.

items.label: Launch readiness report
items.purpose: Current demo, internal beta, and store readiness state.

items.label: Feature completion report
items.purpose: Tracked task, backlog, and traceability completion evidence.

items.label: Acquisition readiness packet
items.purpose: Buyer due-diligence summary across product, technical, commercial, model, and handoff signals.

items.label: Release handoff packet
items.purpose: Repository, commit, screenshots, blockers, artifacts, and verification commands for handoff.

items.label: Release freshness report
items.purpose: Freshness windows for generated release evidence.

items.label: Release blocker web links
items.purpose: Prefilled issue links for external blockers without mutating GitHub automatically.

items.label: External evidence intake
items.purpose: Proof-reference template for blockers that require accounts, devices, or real validation data.

items.label: MoveNet readiness report
items.purpose: Local model load and inference budget evidence.

items.label: Model verification suite
items.purpose: Aggregated model execution, replay, provider, and real-validation readiness checks.

items.label: Model delivery lifecycle
items.purpose: Build-time vendoring, browser warmup, native delivery, and offline reuse evidence.

items.label: Model asset provenance
items.purpose: Vendored model source, hashes, attribution, and license-review state.

items.label: Dependency license report
items.purpose: Dependency license inventory and notice obligations.

items.label: License review packet
items.purpose: Aggregated dependency, model, notice, and legal-clearance review packet.

items.label: Third-party notices
items.purpose: Share-safe generated third-party notice index for buyer due diligence and distribution review.

items.label: Store submission packet
items.purpose: Store metadata, privacy copy, screenshot, and command packet.

items.label: PWA readiness report
items.purpose: Static installable PWA and offline app boot evidence.
items.refreshCommand: npm run export:web && npm run web:pwa:check

items.label: Web smoke report
items.purpose: Exported web bundle smoke evidence across release UI, PWA cache, and model delivery paths.

items.label: Vercel deployment report
items.purpose: No-backend static Vercel deployment readiness.

items.label: Vercel workflow report
items.purpose: GitHub Actions template readiness for Vercel deployment.

items.label: Vercel deployment handoff
items.purpose: Operational no-backend Vercel deployment handoff with prebuilt deploy, smoke, inspect, and rollback commands.

items.label: Store credentials setup packet
items.purpose: Credential key-name setup packet without account secret values.

items.label: GitHub workflow report
items.purpose: CI workflow activation state and required token scope.

items.label: iOS toolchain report
items.purpose: Full Xcode, Pods, workspace, and build-settings readiness.

items.label: Native QA evidence starter
items.purpose: Template and composer report for physical-device QA evidence.

items.label: Cue-validation dataset report
items.purpose: Doctor report for real consented coach cue-validation data.

items.label: Source archive
items.purpose: Source delivery archive for transfer or review.

items.label: Web dist archive
items.purpose: Static web distribution archive for Vercel-style hosting.

items.label: Release archive manifest
items.purpose: SHA-256 manifest and repository metadata for release archives.

items.label: Real cue-validation dataset proof
items.purpose: Create docs/validation/cue-validation-dataset.json from real consented coach reviews and run the validation gate.
items.refreshCommand: npm run validation:cue:starter && npm run validation:cue:doctor

items.label: Store submission credentials proof
items.purpose: Set Expo, App Store Connect, and Google Play submission credentials outside the repository.
items.refreshCommand: npm run release:credentials:starter && npm run release:credentials:doctor

items.label: EAS project binding proof
items.purpose: Run npx eas-cli@latest init and store extra.eas.projectId in app.json.

items.label: iOS build verification proof
items.purpose: Install full Xcode and verify an iOS simulator or device build.

items.label: Native device QA evidence proof
items.purpose: Capture docs/sdlc/native-qa-evidence.json from physical iOS and Android runs.
items.refreshCommand: npm run native:qa:starter && npm run native:qa:validate

summary.nextAction: Create docs/validation/cue-validation-dataset.json from real consented coach reviews and run the validation gate.
